# Temporal Drift & EWC Consolidation (CONCEPT:AHE-3.6)

## Overview
Tracks knowledge drift via cosine distance/coefficient of variation and applies Elastic Weight Consolidation (EWC++) to prevent catastrophic forgetting (CONCEPT:AHE-3.6).

## Implementation Details
- **Source Code**: ``agent_utilities/knowledge_graph/ewc.py``
- **Pillar**: AHE
